news.title: Court rejects ICE contractor's right to immediate appeal
news.titleCN: 最高法院驳回ICE承包商即时上诉请求
news.summaryCN: 最高法院裁定私人监狱承包商GEO Group不能就有关其拘留设施条件的判决立即提起上诉，涉及《囚犯诉讼改革法》的适用范围。
news.summaryEN: The Supreme Court rules that private prison contractor GEO Group cannot immediately appeal a judgment regarding conditions at its detention facility, involving the scope of the Prison Litigation Reform Act.
news.whyMattersCN: 该案涉及私人监狱监管的法律边界和移民拘留条件的人权保障。GEO Group作为ICE承包商，其拘留设施的人权争议反映了移民执法中外包模式的制度困境，对中国社区矫正和拘留场所管理的外包监管具有警示意义。
news.whyMattersEN: This case involves the legal boundaries of private prison oversight and human rights protections in immigration detention. The case reflects institutional dilemmas in outsourcing models of immigration enforcement.

news.title: Beach blasts and unusually dangerous weapons
news.titleCN: 海滩爆炸案与异常危险武器界定
news.summaryCN: 最高法院审查一起因海滩燃放烟花导致严重伤害的案件，涉及《联邦爆炸物法》中
news.summaryEN: The Supreme Court reviews a case involving serious injuries from fireworks on a beach, addressing the definitional boundaries of
news.whyMattersCN: 该案涉及刑法中危险物品监管的法律标准界定。法院对
的解释将影响烟花等消费品的监管责任和刑事责任认定，对中国危险物品管理法和公共安全监管的精细化具有参考价值。
news.whyMattersEN: This case involves the legal standards for regulating dangerous items in criminal law. The Court's interpretation of
will affect regulatory liability and criminal liability determinations for consumer products like fireworks.

news.title: Trump administration asks justices to allow it to remove protected status from Syrian nationals
news.titleCN: 特朗普政府请求最高法院终止叙利亚公民临时保护身份
news.summaryCN: 特朗普政府请求最高法院授权终止约8000名叙利亚公民的临时保护身份(TPS)，该身份原本保护他们免于因祖国战乱被驱逐出境。
news.summaryEN: The Trump administration asks the Supreme Court to authorize terminating Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for approximately 8,000 Syrian nationals, which currently protects them from deportation due to conflict in their home country.
news.whyMattersCN: 该案涉及行政权在移民政策中的裁量边界和人道主义保护的法律基础。TPS制度的存废争议反映了美国移民执法中安全考量与人道义务的冲突，对中国难民保护立法和临时居留制度的完善具有比较法意义。
news.whyMattersEN: This case involves the boundaries of executive discretion in immigration policy and the legal foundations of humanitarian protection. The dispute over TPS reflects tensions between security concerns and humanitarian obligations in U.S. immigration enforcement.

news.title: Court to hear argument on whether and when drug users may possess firearms
news.titleCN: 最高法院将审理毒品使用者持枪权案
news.summaryCN: 最高法院将审理United States v. Daniels案，挑战联邦法律禁止非法药物使用者持有枪支的规定，涉及第二修正案权利与公共安全监管的冲突。
news.summaryEN: The Supreme Court will hear United States v. Daniels, challenging federal law that prohibits unlawful drug users from possessing firearms, involving the conflict between Second Amendment rights and public safety regulation.
news.whyMattersCN: 该案触及美国宪法争议最激烈的两个领域——枪支管制与毒品政策的交叉点。法院对
禁枪标准的界定，将影响数百万药物使用者的宪法权利，对中国涉毒人员权利保障和危险人群管控立法的精细化具有参考价值。
news.whyMattersEN: This case touches the intersection of America's most contentious constitutional issues—gun control and drug policy. The Court's definition of
disqualification from gun ownership will affect the constitutional rights of millions of drug users.

news.title: Iran conflict: Israel targets Hizbollah in Lebanon
news.titleCN: Iran conflict: Israel targets Hizbollah in Lebanon
news.summaryCN: 中东地区冲突升级，涉及国际法中的武力使用、主权豁免和战争法规范。
news.summaryEN: Escalating conflict in the Middle East raises questions about use of force, sovereign immunity, and the laws of war.
news.whyMattersCN: 该冲突对全球能源供应、国际贸易秩序和国际法治可能产生连锁影响，国际法中的自卫权和战争法规范面临新的考验。
news.whyMattersEN: The conflict may have cascading effects on global energy supplies, international trade order, and the rule of international law.

news.titleCN: Trump's epic gamble in the Middle East
news.summaryCN: 中东地区冲突升级，涉及国际法中的武力使用、主权豁免和战争法规范。

news.summaryEN: Escalating conflict in the Middle East raises questions about use of force, sovereign immunity, and the laws of war.

news.title: Air travel heavily disrupted following Iranian strikes
news.titleCN: 伊朗袭击后航空交通严重中断
news.summaryCN: 伊朗导弹袭击导致中东地区航空交通大规模中断，数万旅客滞留，国际航空法中的安全管辖权和航空器主权豁免问题凸显。
news.summaryEN: Iranian missile strikes cause large-scale disruption of air traffic in the Middle East, stranding tens of thousands of passengers and highlighting issues of aviation safety jurisdiction and aircraft sovereign immunity.
news.whyMattersCN: 该案涉及国际航空法中的安全管辖权和航空器主权豁免问题。武装冲突对国际民航安全的威胁及其法律后果，对中国民航安全监管和紧急情况下的航空管制具有参考价值。
news.whyMattersEN: This case involves issues of safety jurisdiction and aircraft sovereign immunity in international aviation law. The threat of armed conflict to international civil aviation safety has reference value for China's aviation safety regulation.

news.title: Starmer will let US use UK bases for attacks on Iranian missile sites
news.titleCN: 英国首相授权美军使用英国基地打击伊朗导弹设施
news.summaryCN: 英国首相斯塔默授权美军使用英国在塞浦路斯的军事基地对伊朗境内导弹设施发动打击，引发英国国内关于战争权力和议会监督的宪法争议。
news.summaryEN: UK Prime Minister Starmer authorizes U.S. forces to use British military bases in Cyprus to strike Iranian missile facilities, sparking constitutional debates in the UK about war powers and parliamentary oversight.
news.whyMattersCN: 该案涉及战争权力的宪法分配和议会监督机制。首相绕过议会授权外国军队使用英国领土发动战争，触及英国宪法中行政权与立法权的权力边界，对中国紧急状态下的权力行使和军事决策程序具有比较法参考价值。
news.whyMattersEN: This case involves the constitutional allocation of war powers and parliamentary oversight mechanisms. The Prime Minister's authorization of foreign military action without parliamentary approval touches on the boundaries between executive and legislative power.

news.title: Supreme Court to consider whether freight brokers can be held liable for negligent hiring
news.titleCN: 最高法院将审理货运经纪人过失雇佣责任案
news.summaryCN: 最高法院将审理一起涉及货运经纪人是否应对其推荐的卡车司机的过失行为承担责任的案件，触及联邦航运法对州侵权诉讼的优先适用问题。
news.summaryEN: The Supreme Court will hear a case involving whether freight brokers can be held liable for negligent hiring of truck drivers they recommend, touching on federal shipping law preemption of state tort claims.
news.whyMattersCN: 该案涉及联邦法律优先适用原则和州侵权责任的边界。法院对联邦航运法优先适用范围的界定，将影响跨州运输行业中的责任分配和受害人救济途径，对中国物流行业监管和平台经济中的责任认定具有参考价值。
news.whyMattersEN: This case involves the boundaries of federal preemption and state tort liability. The Court's definition of federal shipping law preemption will affect liability allocation and victim remedies in interstate transportation.

news.title: Justices appear dubious of challenge to constitutionality of foreclosure sales
news.titleCN: 大法官对法拍销售宪法性质疑持怀疑态度
news.summaryCN: 最高法院审理一起挑战密歇根州法拍销售程序合宪性的案件，涉及破产法中的财产权保护和程序正当性要求。
news.summaryEN: The Supreme Court hears a case challenging the constitutionality of Michigan's foreclosure sale procedures, involving property rights protection and procedural due process requirements in bankruptcy law.
news.whyMattersCN: 该案涉及破产法中的财产权保护和程序正当性。大法官对法拍销售程序合宪性的态度，将影响各州财产执行程序的合法性审查标准，对中国民事执行程序中的财产处置和债务人权利保护具有参考价值。
news.whyMattersEN: This case involves property rights protection and procedural due process in bankruptcy law. The Justices' attitude toward the constitutionality of foreclosure procedures will affect the standards for reviewing the legality of property enforcement procedures across states.

news.title: The major debate over major questions in the tariffs decision is only the beginning
news.titleCN: 关税裁决中的重大问题之争仅是开端
news.summaryCN: Abbe Gluck在SCOTUSblog撰文分析最高法院推翻特朗普关税政策的判决，探讨重大问题原则对行政权力的限制及其后续影响。
news.summaryEN: Abbe Gluck analyzes the Supreme Court's decision striking down Trump's tariff policy on SCOTUSblog, exploring how the Major Questions Doctrine limits executive power and its subsequent implications.
news.whyMattersCN: 重大问题原则的适用正在重塑美国行政法的权力格局。该判决限制了总统在重大经济政策上的单边行动能力，对理解司法审查强化趋势下行政权的边界具有里程碑意义，也为中国行政法中的权力监督机制提供了比较视角。
news.whyMattersEN: The application of the Major Questions Doctrine is reshaping the power landscape of American administrative law. This decision limits the President's unilateral action capability on major economic policies.

research.title: Construction and Management of the South Florida Detention Facility
research.titleCN: Construction and Management of the South Florida Detention Facility
research.summaryCN: 发表在权威法学期刊上的学术研究，从理论和实证维度深入分析相关制度议题。
research.summaryEN: Academic research published in a leading law journal, analyzing relevant institutional issues from theoretical and empirical dimensions.
research.whyMattersCN: 该研究运用法学理论分析具体制度实践，其研究框架和论证逻辑对中国相关领域的学术研究和制度建构具有方法论参考价值，可为中国法治建设提供域外经验借鉴。
research.whyMattersEN: This research applies legal theory to analyze specific institutional practices. Its analytical framework and argumentative logic offer methodological reference value for China's academic research and institutional development.

research.title: The Semantics of Jury Nullification: How Terminology Shapes (and Misshapes) the Jury's Role
research.titleCN: The Semantics of Jury Nullification: How Terminology Shapes (and Misshapes) the Jury's Role
research.summaryCN: 研究陪审团制度的运作逻辑和裁判语义学，分析对抗制诉讼中事实认定的制度设计。
research.summaryEN: Studies the operational logic of jury systems and forensic semantics, analyzing institutional design for fact-finding in adversarial litigation.
research.whyMattersCN: 陪审团制度是普通法系的核心特征，该研究对理解对抗制诉讼中事实认定的制度逻辑具有启发意义，对中国人民陪审员制度的改革完善有参考价值。
research.whyMattersEN: The jury system is central to common law. This research offers insights into fact-finding logic in adversarial systems and reference value for China's people's assessor system reform.

research.title: Fourth Amendment Equilibrium Adjustment in an Age of Technological Upheaval
research.titleCN: Fourth Amendment Equilibrium Adjustment in an Age of Technological Upheaval
research.summaryCN: 探讨数字时代第四修正案的适用边界，分析执法权力与个人隐私权的平衡机制。
research.summaryEN: Examines the Fourth Amendment's application in the digital age, analyzing the balance between law enforcement power and privacy rights.
research.whyMattersCN: 第四修正案在数字时代的适用是当下最重要的宪法议题之一，对中国刑事诉讼法中技术侦查措施的规制和数字隐私保护立法具有直接参考价值。
research.whyMattersEN: The Fourth Amendment's application in the digital age is one of the most important constitutional issues today, offering direct reference value for China's criminal procedure law and digital privacy legislation.

research.title: Drug Scheduling as Institutional Design
research.summaryCN: 分析美国药物管制制度的制度设计与实施后果，探讨量刑政策与大规模监禁的关系。
research.summaryEN: Analyzes the institutional design and implementation consequences of U.S. drug scheduling, exploring the relationship between sentencing policy and mass incarceration.
research.whyMattersCN: 量刑政策与大规模监禁是美国刑事司法的核心批评领域，该研究的实证发现可以为中国毒品治理政策的科学化和量刑规范化改革提供比较视角。
research.whyMattersEN: Sentencing policy and mass incarceration are central critiques of U.S. criminal justice. This research offers comparative perspectives for China's drug policy and sentencing reform.
